/usr/bin/c++  -O3 -DNDEBUG   CMakeFiles/hmi_scene.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hmi_scene.dir/src/Scene.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hmi_scene.dir/src/FpsCounter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hmi_scene.dir/src/model/BaseModel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hmi_scene.dir/src/model/ImportedModel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hmi_scene.dir/src/model/ModelManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hmi_scene.dir/src/loader/GLTFLoader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hmi_scene.dir/src/importer/ModelImporter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hmi_scene.dir/src/controller/ModelController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hmi_scene.dir/src/controller/UDPDataManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hmi_scene.dir/src/ui/TextRenderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hmi_scene.dir/src/audioplayder/AudioPlayer.cpp.o  -o hmi_scene  -lglfw -lEGL -lGLESv2 -ljsoncpp /usr/local/lib/libdraco.a -lglfw -lEGL -lGLESv2 -lasound -ljsoncpp /usr/local/lib/libdraco.a -lasound -lpthread
